SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Set For Trial On Dec-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Continued To Dec-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: James Ghilotti, Esq., Bar# 309734, for and with Appellant/Defendant, Dogwalks Dog Care, Inc. represented by Julia Frink, Owner. Al Lee Respondent/Plaintiff is present.

This case is on Calendar and before the Hon. Mary E. Wiss for Trial De Novo.
The Litigants are sworn in by the Clerk.

Mr. Lee calls witness, under EC-776, Ms. Julie Ann Frink for testimony.
Exhibit #1 - Email chain. ADMITTED

Mr. Ghilotti commences direct examination.
Exhibit A - Photo of rearend of defendant's vehicle. ADMITTED
Exhibit B - Photo of close-up of wooden box, point-of-impact. ADMITTED
Exhibit C - Photo of storage locker. ADMITTED
Exhibit D - Contractor's estimate. ADMITTED

Mr. Lee commences Re-Cross.

Mr. Ghilotti commences Re Direct.

Mr. Lee calls himself, Albert Lee, as a witness.
Exhibit 2 - A group of 10 photos. ADMITTED
Exhibit 3 - Email, 7 pages. ADMITTED

Mr. Ghilotti commences Cross Examination.
Exhibit F - Document, 2 pages. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION
Exhibit G - Group of 4 photos. - PAGE 4 ONLY IS ADMITTED
Exhibit H - A Single Photo. ADMITTED

Plaintiff Rests // Defense Rests

The Court asks follow up questions.
The Court gives the parties the Court's thoughts on the evidence presented.

Mr. Lee gives Closing Statement, and reply
Mr. Ghilotti gives Closing Statement.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Not report (D305)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Judgment Entered
